data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for check-in tracking, specifically to confirm who arrived and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or data regarding the actual check-in process or tracking of attendees. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but without concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or validated, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
